# Jira Ticket — BL-BENCH-044

**Summary:** Implement canonical benchmark evidence and run-acceptance governance  
**Issue type:** Story  
**Priority:** High  
**Status:** Open  
**Component:** Benchmark Evidence / Governance  
**Labels:** benchmark, evidence, run-acceptance, canonicalization, audit, arf

## Description

Implement the complete process described in the attached source document:

`backlog_attachments/BL-BENCH-044/BENCHMARK_EVIDENCE_AND_RUN_ACCEPTANCE_PROCESS_UA.md`

The attachment is the full issue description and normative source of truth. It defines evidence-base structure, Playbook approval, neutral launch prompts, run auditing, three-score evaluation, explicit user confirmation, revision handling, comparative scoreboards, invalidation, versioning, manifests and model behavior.

## Business outcome

Only separately audited and explicitly user-confirmed Playbooks and runs become canonical benchmark evidence. Working, rejected, superseded and quarantined artifacts remain traceable but cannot affect canonical comparisons.

## Acceptance criteria

See `044_BENCHMARK_EVIDENCE_AND_RUN_ACCEPTANCE_GOVERNANCE.md` and the complete attached source document. All listed fail-closed conditions and acceptance criteria are mandatory.
